evals.name: english-show-me
evals.prompt: show me what's loaded in my Claude Code right now. I want to see all my skills, agents, MCPs, and what overrides what in this project.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML file at ~/.claude/snapshots/show-me-<timestamp>.html that renders an interactive markmap with three top-level branches (~/.claude global, ./project, X-ray meta), filter buttons (All/Global/Project), and the actual content of the user's setup (real skill names, agent names, etc. — not made up).

evals.name: hebrew-treh-li
evals.prompt: תראה לי מה פעיל עכשיו בפרויקט הזה — אילו skills טעונים, מי דורס מי בין הגלובלי והפרויקטלי
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 0 — the skill should trigger on Hebrew phrasing 'תראה לי' and produce the same kind of HTML markmap snapshot.

evals.name: casual-audit
evals.prompt: I keep losing track of which skills I have installed. Can you give me a visual map of all my skills and agents — global ones and project ones — so I can see them at a glance?
evals.expected_output: Same kind of HTML markmap snapshot. The skill should trigger even though the user didn't say 'show me' or 'x-ray' explicitly.
